catering_fnb.label: Catering & F&B
catering_fnb.rationale: Clients can compare per-head pricing. Hold the floor.

venues_room_rentals.label: Venues & Room Rentals
venues_room_rentals.rationale: Competitive category; sourcing and negotiation adds value. Push to 60% when managing full venue relationship.

av_production.label: AV & Production
av_production.rationale: Technical coordination, load-in management, vendor liaison. Harder for clients to price-shop.

decor_design.label: Décor & Design
decor_design.rationale: Fully custom creative work. No apples-to-apples comparison exists.

entertainment.label: Entertainment
entertainment.rationale: Talent sourcing, contract negotiation, rider management, logistics.

transportation.label: Transportation
transportation.rationale: Route planning, driver coordination, timing, backup plans. High-liability, high-coordination.

staffing_labor.label: Staffing & Labor
staffing_labor.rationale: Recruitment, briefing, scheduling, onsite management. QC owns the outcome.

purchased_sourced_items.label: Purchased / Sourced Items
purchased_sourced_items.rationale: Procurement, handling, inventory, setup, disposal. Small dollar items that take disproportionate time (3× cost).

tours_guided_experiences.label: Tours & Guided Experiences
tours_guided_experiences.rationale: Guide sourcing, route design, F&B coordination. Fixed costs scale across group sizes.
